sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70518" key="neuroxarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νευρο-χᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n70518.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">delighting in the bowstring</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the lyre,</tr_> epith. of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.14</biblScope> </bibl> (prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεβροχαρῆ</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
